use_cases: Primary call-to-action for forms and user interactions
Trigger actions like submission, confirmation, or navigation
Accessible button with keyboard navigation and screen reader support
Destructive actions with dedicated destructive variant
Ghost or outline styles for secondary actions
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style button component built with Radix UI and class-variance-authority. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes asChild pattern via Radix Slot for composition, proper TypeScript types, and focus-visible accessibility states. Designed as an atomic UI building block for any web application.
